title: BYD And VinFast Race To Dominate Southeast Asia's EV Market
summary:
BYD And VinFast Race To Dominate Southeast Asia's EV Market

            BYD and VinFast are rapidly expanding their presence in Southeast Asia, where electric vehicles are gaining traction and competition is intensifying, according to Nikkei. Both companies have emerged as the fastest-growing car brands in the region’s six largest markets in 2025, with sales rising about 95% for BYD and 90% for VinFast compared with the previous year.

VinFast sold more than 100,000 vehicles across countries in
summary_ko: BYD와 VinFast가 동남아시아의 전기차 시장에서 우위를 점하기 위해 경쟁하고 있습니다.

title: STAT+: FDA approves Rocket gene therapy for rare immune disorder
summary: Kresladi has been tested in just nine patients but has had positive results.
summary_ko: FDA가 Rocket 제네 테라피를 희귀한 면역 질환에 대한 치료제로 승인했다. 이 치료제는 9명의 환자에게 테스트되었지만 긍정적인 결과를 보였다.

title: STAT+: Denali Therapeutics, Corcept Therapeutics win FDA approvals
summary: In today's Readout Newsletter, Denali and Corcept win FDA approvals, Sarepta eyes a rebound, and Allogene progresses with an off-the-shelf CAR-T.
summary_ko: Denali Therapeutics와 Corcept Therapeutics가 FDA 승인을 받았다. 또한 Sarepta는 반등을 노리고 있으며 Allogene는 오프-더-쉘프 CAR-T를 진행 중이다.

title: AirGas Declares Force Majeure On Helium Shipments As Qatar Production Collapses
summary:
AirGas Declares Force Majeure On Helium Shipments As Qatar Production Collapses

            Earlier this week we reported that global chip production was in peril as "Qatar Warns Helium Exports Set To Collapse." Best known as the gas that makes party balloons float, helium is far more important as a key input in chipmaking, space rockets and medical imaging. The problem is that Qatar supplies a third of the world’s helium, and the Gulf nation had to halt production after Iranian strikes against
summary_ko: AirGas가 헬륨 수출을 중단하고 생산이 붕괴된 카타르에서 강제 조치 선언했습니다.

title: STAT+: Allogene’s off-the-shelf CAR-T is nearing an early but pivotal study readout
summary: A preliminary readout from a study could vindicate Allogene Therapeutics' stubborn belief in its off-the-shelf CAR-T treatment.
summary_ko: Allogene의 오프-더-쉘프 CAR-T 치료제가 초기 연구 결과를 발표할 예정입니다. 이 결과는 CAR-T 치료제의 효능을 입증할 수 있습니다.

title: FDA clears Denali drug in ‘clear step’ for rare disease biotechs
summary: The approval of Denali’s Hunter syndrome treatment, Avlayah, comes after a series of drug rejections and delays that had led to criticism of the FDA’s stance on rare disease therapies.
summary_ko: FDA가 드문 질병 치료제에 대한 승인을 내렸습니다. 이 결정은 드문 질병 치료제 개발에 대한 명확한 단계입니다.
